a60b5595.name: Fallback_Bootstrap_2

edff016e.name: Fallback_Bootstrap_3

afbd2904.name: Fallback_Bootstrap_4

a800d52e.name: RSI_14_25_75_Crossover
a800d52e.explanation: Combines fast RSI with slower RSI and requires positive EMA_20 to reduce whipsaws while tightening the parent strategy thresholds.

ff05b466.name: RSI2_RSI14_EMA20_Confirmation
ff05b466.explanation: Mutated the parent by combining fast RSI, slow RSI, and EMA confirmation with adjusted thresholds for more selective entries and exits.

5c61237b.name: rsi_confluence_mutation
5c61237b.explanation: Combines fast and slow RSI thresholds to reduce false signals.

14bc4fa9.name: rsi_2_14_confluence_thresholds
14bc4fa9.explanation: Mutated to require both fast and medium RSI confirmation, with slightly wider threshold bands than the parent.

ea29149f.name: combined_rsi_ema_thresholds
ea29149f.explanation: Mutated the parent by adding combined RSI confirmation and EMA availability checks with adjusted thresholds.

f71e4d82.name: rsi_ema_combined_v1
f71e4d82.explanation: Mutated the empty parent strategy into a combined RSI/EMA signal using stricter oversold and overbought thresholds.

fc35917b.name: rsi_ema_combined_thresholds_v1
fc35917b.explanation: Adjusted RSI thresholds and combined RSI-14 with EMA-20 for buys, while adding RSI-2 confirmation for sells.

5835d02b.name: tight_rsi_pair_mutation
5835d02b.explanation: Combines fast RSI and slower RSI confirmation with tighter thresholds to reduce false entries.

f5faead8.name: RSI14_RSI2_oversold_overbought
f5faead8.explanation: Tightens the parent RSI bands and requires agreement from the faster RSI-2 before issuing a signal.

e0c7cafe.name: rsi_combo_trend_filter
e0c7cafe.explanation: Combines RSI 2 and RSI 14 thresholds with an EMA 20 availability filter to reduce false RSI extremes.

31aa2763.name: tightened_rsi_momentum
31aa2763.explanation: Tightened the RSI thresholds and kept the combined RSI-2, RSI-14, and EMA-20 confirmation logic.

9c0e1d63.name: rsi_2_14_confluence
9c0e1d63.explanation: Combines short-term and medium-term RSI thresholds for more selective buy and sell signals.

00558582.name: tighter_rsi_14_ema_filter
00558582.explanation: Tightened the RSI thresholds and kept the combined RSI-14 plus EMA confirmation filter for entries and exits.

84400874.name: rsi_2_14_confluence_25_75
84400874.explanation: Combines fast and slow RSI thresholds: buy when RSI 2 is below 25 and RSI 14 is below 45; sell when RSI 2 is above 75 and RSI 14 is above 55.

b7482906.name: rsi2_rsi14_mean_reversion
b7482906.explanation: Buys only when very short-term RSI is deeply oversold and medium RSI is below neutral; sells when short-term RSI is extremely overbought and medium RSI is above neutral.

bd2289f9.name: tighter_rsi_ema_reversal
bd2289f9.explanation: Tightens the RSI-2 reversal thresholds while keeping RSI-14 confirmation and positive EMA-20 filtering for both buy and sell signals.
